title: Bitcoin Supply and Demand
description: Bitcoin supply is programmatically constrained by its issuance schedule, so long-run supply expansion is not discretionary. When demand for holding or transacting in bitcoin rises against that static schedule, price tends to increase.

resources.title: BIP 42: A Finite Monetary Supply for Bitcoin
resources.notes: Consensus-level reference for Bitcoin's finite issuance design.

resources.title: Bitcoin Developer Guide: Block Chain
resources.notes: Background on issuance mechanics and chain-level monetary rules.

resources.title: Bitcoin.page
resources.notes: Accessible explanations linking scarcity, demand, and price behavior.

resources.title: The Bitcoin Standard
resources.notes: Accessible thesis for how fixed supply interacts with rising monetary demand.
